title: ESP32-S31
summary: The ESP32-S3 is a system-on-chip (SoC) from Espressif that integrates a dual-core Xtensa LX7 CPU, AI accelerators (for vector/matrix operations), and Wi-Fi/Bluetooth connectivity. It is designed for edge AI applications, enabling on-device machine learning inference for tasks like image recognition and voice processing, often using frameworks like ESP-DL or TensorFlow Lite Micro.
